backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with role-based access control (admin/user), user profile management, and category/product CRUD operations using mixin-based authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs (related to CategoryPage infinite scroll refactoring) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript frontend components, hooks, pages, and stores.
frontend/docs/ii-alternative-origins-man: Manual QA checklist for verifying Internet Identity authentication works correctly on both kelanicosmetics.es and www.kelanicosmetics.es production domains, including troubleshooting steps.
frontend/docs/product-details-modal-hist: Manual QA checklist validating product details modal navigation behavior (back button, close button, ESC key) across homepage, search results, and category page contexts.
frontend/index.css: Empty global CSS file for the frontend application.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Kelani Cosmetics React app, mounting the app into a div#root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Internet Identity alternative origins configuration file listing both https://kelanicosmetics.es and https://www.kelanicosmetics.es as valid authentication origins.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all search engine crawlers full site access and pointing to the sitemap at kelanicosmetics.es/sitemap.xml.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing three public URLs (homepage, contacto, privacy) with their last-modified dates, change frequencies, and priority values.
frontend/scripts/verify-well-known-ii-al: Short documentation stub providing instructions to verify the .well-known/ii-alternative-origins file is correctly served by the frontend build.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the route tree and renders the global ToastViewport alongside the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Displays an access-denied screen for non-admin users, showing their Internet Identity principal with a copy button and a logout option.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminHeade: Fixed top navigation header for the admin panel that includes a sidebar toggle, brand logo, logout button, and a Web Worker-based session keep-alive mechanism.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLogin: Login screen for the admin panel that triggers Internet Identity authentication via a single sign-in button with a loading state.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminSideb: Responsive sidebar navigation for the admin panel with links to all major sections, a mobile overlay, and active-route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminVerif: Full-screen loading card displayed while admin permissions are being verified after login.
frontend/src/components/admin/categories: Mobile-friendly card list for displaying categories with inline reorder (up/down) controls and edit/delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/admin/CopyIconBu: Icon button that copies a given string to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardN: Clickable card component used on the admin dashboard to navigate to a specific admin section, displaying an icon and title.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/C: A dropdown select component for filtering products by category, fetching all categories via a query hook and converting sentinel values to null for 'All categories' selection.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/D: An alert dialog for permanently deleting a product that requires the user to enter a hardcoded confirmation password before the delete mutation is executed.
frontend/src/components/admin/products/P: A card-based mobile-friendly product list view that displays product details and provides inline toggles for store stock and featured status, plus edit/delete actions.
A pagination control component supporting page navigation, ellipsis for large page counts, and a page-size selector with options for 10, 50, or 100 rows.
A table view for listing products with inline checkboxes to toggle per-store stock and featured status, plus copy-barcode, edit, and delete action buttons per row.
A modal dialog for creating or editing a product, managing form state for fields like barcode, name, category, price, stock, and photo with WebP conversion support.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Dele: An alert dialog that confirms and executes permanent deletion of a sale item using the delete mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/admin/sales/Sale: An alert dialog that confirms deactivation of a sale item, delegating the actual action to an onConfirm callback passed by the parent.
Renders a list of sale items as mobile-friendly cards with toggle-active, edit, and delete actions, including a deactivation confirmation dialog.
Provides a status filter dropdown (all/active) for the sale items list using a SafeSelect component.
Renders pagination controls for the sale items list, including page size selection, page number buttons with ellipsis, and previous/next navigation.
Displays sale items in a tabular format with columns for product details, prices, dates, status, and active toggle, plus edit and delete action buttons.
Renders a colored Badge component indicating a sale item's status (active, upcoming, or expired) based on the result of `getSaleStatus`.
A dialog modal for creating or editing a sale item, featuring product search, price/discount calculation, and date range inputs with form validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/store-deta: Renders Save and Restore action buttons for the store details form, disabling them when there are no changes or a save is in progress.
A form component for editing store details including basic info (name, address, contact), social media links, and per-day store hours with validation error display.
Renders a read-only preview of store details (name, address, phone, email, hours, coordinates) using icons, mirroring how the info appears on the contact page.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: A reusable dropdown component that fetches categories from the backend via `useCategoryOptions` and renders them as selectable items, handling loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Reusable loading spinner component using a Lucide Loader2 icon with configurable size (sm/md/lg), optional inline layout, and a customizable message.
frontend/src/components/public/CookieCon: Displays a cookie consent banner with accept/decline buttons, hiding itself on the privacy page or if consent has already been recorded via `cookieUtils`.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Cate: Renders a single product category row with a heading, a 'view all' button navigating to the category page, and a responsive product card grid (4 on mobile, 5 on desktop).
frontend/src/components/public/home/Home: Composes the homepage hero area by combining the `StoreBanner` full-width image and the `SearchBar` centered below it.
Renders an infinite-scroll list of category sections on the homepage, loading more categories as the user scrolls using `useHomepageCategoriesInfinite` and `useInfiniteScroll`.
frontend/src/components/public/home/sear: Dropdown listbox that displays search results, a loading spinner, an error message, or an empty state, delegating individual result rendering to `SearchResultItem`.
A search bar component with autocomplete dropdown for the homepage, handling query input, keyboard navigation, result selection, and blob URL lifecycle management for product images.
A single autocomplete search result row displaying product name, category, and price (sale or regular), rendered as an accessible button with active/hover highlighting.
frontend/src/components/public/home/Stor: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, and centered store name and description text.
frontend/src/components/public/product/C: A reusable button that copies arbitrary text to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a textarea fallback, showing a success toast and a temporary checkmark icon.
frontend/src/components/public/product/P: A modal dialog that displays full product details (image, price, sale badge, stock status, store selector, share button) for both ProductWithSale and HomepageSearchResult data shapes, managing body scroll lock and blob URL resolution.
A thin wrapper component that mounts ProductDetailsModal at the PublicLayout level to provide consistent modal behavior across all public pages.
frontend/src/components/public/product/S: A button that shares a product URL via the Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy, showing a temporary 'Copiado' confirmation state.
An expandable button group that lets users select a store and opens a WhatsApp contact link for the chosen store regarding a specific product.
frontend/src/components/public/products/: A memoized card component displaying a product's image, name, stock indicators, sale badge, and price, triggering an onClick handler when clicked or activated via keyboard.
A memoized responsive grid that renders a list of ProductCard components and opens the product details modal with history on card click.
Displays color-coded stock status pills for two stores with tooltips; on mobile, tooltips are toggled by tap with auto-dismiss and outside-click dismissal.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicFoo: Site-wide public footer that shows a branding banner, per-store contact/hours columns fetched from `useBothStoreDetails`, and bottom navigation links including privacy policy.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicHea: Sticky public site header with a hamburger menu button that triggers a side panel, a logo link, and a desktop-only contact navigation link.
frontend/src/components/public/PublicSid: Slide-in navigation panel with main links (Home, Contact, Privacy) and a scrollable list of categories fetched via `usePublicCategories`, closeable via overlay click or Escape key.
Empty test file for the SafeSelect component with no test cases defined.
frontend/src/components/SafeSelect.tsx: A wrapper around the shadcn Select component that enforces sentinel values ('all', 'none', 'no-change') to prevent empty string errors, with utility functions for initializing state and converting sentinels to null for API calls.
frontend/src/components/seo/SeoHead.tsx: A React component that dynamically injects and manages SEO meta tags (description, Open Graph, Twitter, canonical) into the document head using useEffect, cleaning them up on unmount.
frontend/src/components/seo/seoPresets.t: Defines pre-configured SEO metadata objects for the home, contact, and privacy pages of the Kelani Cosmetics site.
A toast notification card component that displays a typed message with an icon, supports auto-dismiss with a pauseable timer on hover, and animates entry/exit.
frontend/src/components/toast/ToastViewp: Renders the container for all active toast notifications by reading from the toast store and mapping each to a ToastCard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExport.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching export statistics (category/product counts) and triggering a full data export mutation via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminImport.ts: Exposes an importData function that calls the backend actor's batchImportData method, with structured error handling for unauthorized and invalid-reference cases.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUserManagemen: Provides React Query hooks for listing managed users and mutations to promote or demote users to/from admin roles via the backend actor.
Checks whether the current user is an admin by querying the backend, with a 30-day cache stored in the auth store to avoid redundant calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useBothStoreDetails.t: React Query hook that fetches both store details in a single backend call using a stable actor pattern, returning ordered store details with extended stale/gc times.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryOptions.ts: Hook that maps backend categories to dropdown-compatible option objects (value/label) using useGetAllCategories, with loading and empty state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useCategoryProductsPa: Hook for fetching paginated, featured-first, sale-aware products for a given category from the backend, supporting dynamic page size and retry via refetch.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageAutocomple: Hook that debounces a search query (300ms) and fetches up to 10 homepage search results from the backend when the query is at least 2 characters long.
frontend/src/hooks/useHomepageCategories: Hook that implements manual infinite loading of homepage categories by accumulating pages of CategorizedProductWithSale data and exposing a loadMore callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInfiniteScroll.ts: Hook that triggers a loadMore callback when the user scrolls near the bottom of the page, using IntersectionObserver with a rAF-throttled scroll fallback and a cooldown period to prevent duplicate triggers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/clear functions and status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Thin wrapper around the IntersectionObserver API that returns a ref and a boolean indicating whether the referenced element is currently intersecting the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaQuery.ts: Hooks for evaluating CSS media queries reactively, with convenience exports useIsMobile (≤768px) and useIsTouchDevice (hover:none/pointer:coarse).
frontend/src/hooks/useProductModalNaviga: Hook that integrates the product modal store with browser history, pushing a state entry on open and handling popstate events so the back button correctly closes the modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductPhotoBlobUr: React hook that converts a Uint8Array product photo into a memoized blob URL, automatically revoking the previous URL when the photo changes or the component unmounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mapping utilities for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting products, including support for paginated product lists and sale-aware product fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductSearchForSa: React Query hook that debounces a search string and queries the backend for products matching the query, returning results filtered to only those with prices for use in sale item creation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicCategories.t: React Query hook that fetches all categories for public pages, using a stable actor pattern and only triggering the fetch when a side panel is open.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting categories, with bigint-to-number conversion between backend and UI types.
frontend/src/hooks/useRequireAdminNaviga: Hook that redirects authenticated non-admin users to the /admin login page and exposes whether the current user has admin access and whether verification is in progress.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaleItemQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting sale items, including a utility to determine sale status (active, upcoming, or expired) using BigInt-safe timestamp comparisons.
frontend/src/hooks/useStoreDetailsQuerie: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for fetching and updating store details, handling coordinate serialization/deserialization and bigint timestamp preservation between backend and UI types.
frontend/src/hooks/useSyncAuthFromIntern: Hook that syncs the Internet Identity principal into the auth store whenever the identity changes, setting it to null on logout.
frontend/src/hooks/useToggleProductFeatu: Custom React hook that provides a mutation to toggle a product's featured status, with optimistic updates across paginated and flat query caches and rollback on error.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart colors), and styles toast notification animations.
frontend/src/layouts/admin/DashboardLayo: Admin dashboard layout component that composes the AdminHeader and AdminSidebar with a toggleable sidebar state, wrapping page content in a constrained main area.
frontend/src/layouts/public/PublicLayout: Public-facing layout component that renders the header, side panel, footer, product modal host, and cookie consent banner around a router Outlet.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRoute.tsx: Protected admin route component that checks authentication and admin status via Internet Identity, showing login, loading, or access-denied states before rendering the dashboard layout.
Admin page for managing product categories with search, create/edit/delete dialogs, reordering controls, and a responsive table/card view.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardHomePa: Admin dashboard home page that renders a grid of navigation cards linking to major admin sections like products, categories, users, and import/export.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ExportPage.tsx: Admin export page that fetches store statistics, serializes products and categories to a formatted JSON file, and triggers a browser download with a dated filename.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ImportPage.tsx: Admin page for importing store data from a JSON file, handling drag-and-drop upload, validation, and displaying import results including category/product counts and errors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/OnSaleProductsP: Admin page for managing on-sale products with paginated listing, search/filter controls, and modals for creating, editing, and deleting sale items.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProductsPage.ts: Admin page for managing products with paginated listing, debounced search, category filtering, and modals for creating, editing, and deleting products.
frontend/src/pages/admin/StoreDetailsPag: Admin page for viewing and editing details for two stores, with tabbed forms, validation, preview, and save/reset actions backed by React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UserManagementP: Admin page for managing user roles, allowing admins to search users, promote principals to admin, and demote admins back to regular users via a table UI with modals.
frontend/src/pages/public/CategoryPage.t: Displays a paginated, infinite-scroll product listing for a specific category, resetting state on category or page size changes and accumulating products as the user scrolls.
frontend/src/pages/public/ContactoPage.t: Shows store contact information (address, phone, social links, hours) with an embedded Google Map that requires cookie consent before rendering.
frontend/src/pages/public/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public home page with a hero section and infinite-scroll categories section, showing loading/error states and clearing query cache on unmount.
frontend/src/pages/public/PrivacyPage.ts: Displays a static privacy policy page for Kelani Cosmetics with a brief simulated loading state and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/public/ProductPage.ts: Shows a single product's details (image, price, sale badge, stock status, store selector) fetched by barcode, with SEO head and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/router.tsx: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree, grouping public pages under PublicLayout and admin pages under AdminRoute with their respective child routes.
frontend/src/session-worker.js: A Web Worker that posts a keep-alive message to the main thread every 60 seconds to prevent session timeouts, and stops the interval when it receives a 'stop' message.
frontend/src/stores/authStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence for authentication state, managing principal, admin status, and a 30-day admin recheck interval.
frontend/src/stores/productModalStore.ts: Zustand store managing product modal open/close state, product data, store details, and a precomputed blob URL that is revoked on close.
frontend/src/stores/toastStore.ts: Zustand store for managing toast notifications with type-based default durations and convenience helper functions (toast.success, toast.error, etc.).
frontend/src/utils/adminDate.ts: Date utility functions for converting between HTML date strings, JS Date objects, and ICP nanosecond BigInt timestamps, with display formatting and date range validation.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.te: Empty test file for ApiResponseHandler utilities.
frontend/src/utils/ApiResponseHandler.ts: Provides standardized API response handling with BigInt-aware JSON parsing, a custom ApiError class, and retry logic for network/server errors.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.test: Empty test file for BigIntSerializer utilities.
frontend/src/utils/BigIntSerializer.ts: Utilities for safely converting between BigInt and strings, and a custom JSON parser that automatically converts timestamp fields to BigInt to preserve nanosecond precision.
frontend/src/utils/categoryNumeric.ts: Safe conversion utilities between UI numbers and Candid bigint types for category fields, including a helper for reorder arrays.
frontend/src/utils/cookieUtils.ts: GDPR cookie consent utilities using localStorage to get, set, and check user consent preferences, with a custom event dispatched on change.
frontend/src/utils/googleMaps.ts: Provides utilities to parse coordinate JSON strings and generate Google Maps directions URLs from lat/lng coordinates.
frontend/src/utils/imageWebp.ts: Provides image validation (type/size checks) and conversion utilities to compress and convert images to WebP format using canvas, plus blob URL helpers.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.test: Empty test file for importValidation utilities.
frontend/src/utils/importValidation.ts: Validates and converts imported JSON data (categories and products) into typed backend objects, including timestamp parsing with BigInt support and Spanish error messages.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.test: Empty test file for NumericConverter utilities.
frontend/src/utils/NumericConverter.ts: Utilities for safely converting values to numbers, validating Spanish IVA rates and profit margins, converting stock to boolean, and formatting prices in Spanish locale.
frontend/src/utils/phoneFormat.ts: Formats phone numbers for display and for WhatsApp API links by stripping non-numeric characters and handling country codes.
frontend/src/utils/productImage.ts: Provides a default product image URL constant and a helper to check whether a product has a real photo stored as a Uint8Array.
Wraps error, warning, success, and info reporting by logging details to the console and displaying user-friendly toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/storeDetailsValidatio: Validates store details form fields (name, email, phone, WhatsApp, address, coordinates, hours) and returns a structured result with per-field error messages in Spanish.
frontend/src/utils/storeHoursFormat.ts: Formats store hours objects for display with Spanish day labels and provides a utility to translate English day names to Spanish.
frontend/src/utils/throttle.ts: Implements a generic throttle function that limits how often a callback is invoked, scheduling a trailing call if invoked during the delay period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities to read URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappContact.ts: Builds WhatsApp URLs with pre-filled Spanish product inquiry messages and provides a helper to open WhatsApp in a new tab for a given product.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variants, and keyframe animations, while enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Kelani Cosmetics e-commerce project, documenting a fix for a CategoryPage infinite scroll rendering bug by replacing a complex buffering pattern with immediate product appending and a decoupled spinner timer.
